title: [codereview] appendix-schc.md table uses approximate sizes; add exact byte calculation from BitWriter residue
description: The table now lists 26/42 bytes but test vectors show 33/49 because of tail inclusion and bit packing. Add a function or note for precise residue size. Rules.rs still has empty fields arrays - populate from Python rules.py to make it source of truth. Priority P2. Discovered during codereview-pass-1 for project-LICHEN-upk9.
